message:
test(conformance): differential harness for pwd.h+grp.h vs glibc

CONFORMANCE: libc pwd.h+grp.h diff matrix.

5 functions, 6 tests:
- getpwuid: root (uid=0) + current euid + nonexistent uid
- getpwnam: "root" + nonexistent username
- getgrgid: root group (gid=0) + current egid + nonexistent gid
- getgrnam: "root" + nonexistent group name
- getpwnam_r: re-entrant variant with caller-provided buffer; rc + uid/gid match

NSS state is shared between FrankenLibC and glibc (both read
/etc/passwd through the same nsswitch backend), so the results MUST
be identical. Compare returned struct fields (pw_name, pw_uid, pw_gid,
gr_name, gr_gid).

0 divergences observed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
